positive: A highly stylized, minimalist woodland scene featuring interlocking stylized silhouettes of various forest animals and flora. The central element is a majestic stag and a curious fox interacting with bioluminescent ferns and glowing mushrooms. The style is modern, graphic, and vector-art inspired, utilizing flat colors with deep shadows and strong contrast. The color palette focuses on deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) accented by neon-like glowing teal and gold highlights, perfect for printing on fabric. Composition is circular and symmetrical, creating a cohesive patch-like design. Crisp edges, high detail, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for a t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poor anatomy, text, watermark, signature, out of frame, noisy, artifacts, messy, realistic photo, photographic, gradient sky, bad composition
